# KMStoneX robots.txt file
# Allows search engines to crawl the site
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /*.pdf$
Disallow: /private
Crawl-delay: 1

# Google specific
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

# Bing specific
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Specify sitemap location
Sitemap: https://kmstonex.in/sitemap.xml

# Prevent crawling of duplicate content
User-agent: *
Disallow: /*?*utm
Disallow: /*?*fbclid

# Allow media indexing for image search
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /
